nasb.text: You have been severed from Christ, you who are seeking to be justified by law; you have fallen from grace.

esv.text: You are severed from Christ, you who would be justified by the law; you have fallen away from grace.

cnv.text: 你們這些靠律法稱義的人，是和基督隔絕，從恩典中墜落了。

ccb.text: 你们若想靠遵行律法而被称为义人，就与基督隔绝了，并且离开了上帝的恩典。

csbs.text: 你们这些藉着律法被称为义的人，你们是与基督隔绝，从恩典中堕落了。
